ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Total lines of code in the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path of the file within the project */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., dart, js, py) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metrics belong to */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the file */,
  "maintainability_index" INTEGER /* Maintainability index of the file */,
  "violations" INTEGER /* Number of violations found in the file */,
  "num_arguments" INTEGER /* Number of arguments in the file */,
  "max_nesting" INTEGER /* Maximum nesting level in the file */,
  "technical_debt" INTEGER /* Technical debt associated with the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated metric entry */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the violation (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the violation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the violation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project metric entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metrics belong to */,
  "average_cyclomatic_complexity" REAL /* Average cyclomatic complexity across files in the project */,
  "average_maintainability_index" REAL /* Average maintainability index across files in the project */,
  "total_technical_debt" INTEGER /* Total technical debt for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_history" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
